title: Tamil Nadu 10th Result (OUT) LIVE: TN SSLC results declared at tnresults.nic.in, direct link to check here
description: Tamil Nadu 10th Result (OUT) LIVE: TN SSLC results has been announced today, May 20 at 9.30 am. The Class 10 results can be checked at tnresults.nic.in. Follow the blog for latest updates.
